metadata.description: Custom Claude skills collection by poorants

plugins.name: ant-common-kit
plugins.description: General-purpose, cross-cutting tools usable in any project or context. Currently bundles engram — a networked PARA document brain (PARA management + knowledge-graph linking, MOC hubs, and integrity lint). Carries engram's capture-loop hooks.

plugins.name: ant-dev-kit
plugins.description: Software-development tooling. Bundles code-convention (extract, enforce, and evolve project code conventions) and component-prototype (UI variant prototyping tournament). Grows as more dev-focused skills are added.
